title: Meta Leads Connection
lead_connected: New lead form submissions will automatically enter CRM.
lead_connected_success: You can now submit a test lead form and check lead creation in CRM.
lead_disconnected: After connection, lead form submissions from the selected Page will be created in CRM.
lead_disconnected_success: New submissions from this Page will no longer enter this integration.
lead_confirm_disconnect: After disconnecting, new submissions will stop entering this integration. Existing CRM history stays in place.
lead_error: Check the integration settings and try again.
lead_inactive: Enable the integration in CRM, then return to this page.
lead_missing_context: To connect a Page, open this page from the connected integration card.
lead_unavailable: The service could not prepare the connection. Try again later or contact an administrator.
heading_oauth_error: Meta did not confirm the connection
lead_oauth_error: Try connecting the Page again and approve access in the Meta window.
lead_session_expired: Return to the integration and start the connection again.
notice_connected_success: Connection is complete. If a test submission does not appear in CRM, check lead access in Meta settings.
notice_disconnected_success: You can reconnect this Page later if needed.
notice_confirm_disconnect: Disconnect only if you want to stop receiving submissions for this integration.
notice_error: Settings are incomplete or the connection service is unavailable.
notice_settings_required: Fill in the required CRM integration settings.
notice_service_unavailable: Meta leads connection is not available yet. Contact an administrator.
notice_authorization_required: Connect a Meta Page to start receiving submissions.
notice_disconnect_failed: Could not disconnect the Page. Try again.
notice_invalid_disconnect: Disconnect confirmation has expired. Press Disconnect again.
step_save_settings: First check the CRM integration settings.
step_connect_page: Press the connect button and approve access to the required Meta Page.
step_send_test_lead: After connecting, submit a test lead form.
step_connected_leads: New submissions will create leads or update matched customers.
step_connected_fields: Form data will be copied according to the integration field settings.
step_connected_disconnect: To connect this Page to another integration, connect it there again.
step_disconnect_stop: New submissions will stop entering this integration.
step_disconnect_history: Existing CRM customers, leads, and records are not deleted.
step_disconnect_reconnect: The Page can be connected again after disconnecting.
step_error_retry: Refresh the page and try the action again.
step_error_admin: If the error repeats, contact an administrator.
